title: Broad inbound RDP on an unattached NSG

execution.limitation: The checked-in package is a signed sanitized sample; rerun the allowlisted NSG campaign through Azure MCP before claiming live execution.

allowed_resource_groups: existing unattached lab NSG by explicit allowlist
prohibited_actions: attach the NSG to a subnet or NIC
create a public IP or virtual machine

preconditions: Verify the NSG has zero subnet and NIC attachments
Confirm fixture allowlist and expiry tags
baseline: Collect NSG rules and attachment inventory
injection: Use the allowlisted legacy unattached NSG or deploy an unattached NSG with source Any and TCP/3389
Do not create any compute, interface, subnet attachment, or public IP

expected.observation: An unattached NSG contains an Internet RDP allow rule.

remediation: Remove the rule through version-controlled configuration
Record pull request, commit, What-If, and deployment evidence
retest: Collect fresh rules and attachment inventory
Require no Internet RDP or SSH rule
Reviewer closes only after fresh PASS evidence
cleanup: Verify the fixture resource group contains no scenario-tagged resource
Record cleanup query digest and result
